block_public_acls.description: Indicates whether to block public access control lists (ACLs) for the S3 account.

block_public_policy.description: Indicates whether to block public bucket policies for the S3 account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the S3 account public access block configuration.

ignore_public_acls.description: Indicates whether to ignore public ACLs for the S3 account.

restrict_public_buckets.description: Indicates whether to restrict public bucket policies for the S3 account.
